case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. LASHANNA WHITFIELD ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, LASHANNA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2019
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 64441871) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100035963) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-27-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64441871) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100035839) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036518), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, LASHANNA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 66166619) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, LASHANNA
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64441871) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.85 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64441871) AS TO DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, LASHANNA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITFIELD, LASHANNA $1,941.44 PRINCIPAL, $284.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,226.29, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
